messages.content: Provide a single Bash one-liner to count total lines across all .py files under the current directory. Output code only (no explanations, prompts, or notes).
Provide a single Bash one-liner to count total lines across all .py files under the current directory. Output code only (no explanations, prompts, or notes).

assistant.prompt_text:
<|begin_of_text|><|start_header_id|>system<|end_header_id|>

Cutting Knowledge Date: December 2023
Today Date: 26 Jul 2024

You are a helpful assistant.<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>user<|end_header_id|>

Provide a single Bash one-liner to count total lines across all .py files under the current directory. Output code only (no explanations, prompts, or notes).<|eot_id|><|start_header_id|>assistant<|end_header_id|>

find . -name '*.py' -type f -print0 |
